ops.body: Finding 8 (refuter round): newer-attach-wins can load OLD helper code under the resident daemon — pack imports reuse the name-only module namespace without updating its path (loader.py:87-109, 147-165); after attaching v2 of a pack, main.py runs from v2 but resolves the sys.modules-cached v1 helper, because the daemon rebuilds its registry in the same interpreter (registry.py:125-152). Fresh-process dispatch unaffected. Repair direction: module namespace incorporating the canonical pack root instead of name-only modules.
